title: Common $defs for fresh-plan layer-3 schemas
description: Shared $defs extracted in the Phase A end-of-phase refinement pass (D34). Per-kind schemas $ref into this file rather than duplicating these patterns; single source of truth reduces drift surface (per refinement-pass finding 5.1). The instance-vs-vocabulary identifier split is per refinement-pass finding 1.1 (D34).

vocabulary-identifier.description: Kebab-strict identifier for vocabulary names: extension ids, kind-impl ids (substrate.id, shape.id, adapter.id, specialist.id), role-tags, hook names, capability values, runtime-shape values, payload-subtype values, work-unit-kind bare forms. Per D29 namespacing + D34 vocabulary-vs-instance split.

instance-identifier.description: Broader pattern for workspace-scoped runtime instance ids: workspace.id, actor.id, event.id, work-unit.id, binding-ids. Admits dots and uppercase to accommodate domain-natural keys (e.g., section numbers like 'wu-b-plan-3.2-hennigsdorf-2024', timestamp-shaped event ids). Per D34 refinement-pass finding 1.1.

qualified-identifier.description: Extension-namespaced reference of the form <extension-id>:<vocabulary-identifier> per D29 namespacing.

semver.description: Semver 2.0.0 MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH with optional pre-release + build metadata. Per D33 versioning policy.

version-range.description: npm-style version range expression. Range-intersection semantics per D33.

capability-identifier.description: Either a core abstract capability (D17: hooks, skills, event-streaming) or a fully-qualified extension-registered capability identifier per D29.

payload-subtype-identifier.description: Either a core payload-subtype (D10) or a fully-qualified extension-registered subtype per D29.

actor-subtype-identifier.description: Either a core actor-subtype (D9) or a fully-qualified extension-registered subtype per D29.

runtime-shape-identifier.description: Either a core runtime-shape (D12) or a fully-qualified extension-registered runtime-shape.
